title: Floral Turkish Plant-Based Friendly Tofu Stir-Fry
description: A light and romantic turkish dish featuring tofu in a creamy sauce with the perfect blend of flavors from worcestershire sauce, prepared sous-vide style for added tenderness.
instructions: Preheat sous-vide machine to 60°C (140°F) for 2 hours.
Sous-vide the tofu in water bath with ground cumin, smoked paprika, and plant-based milk for 30 minutes.
While tofu is cooking, heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic and sauté until translucent.
Add Worcestershire sauce to the onion mixture and stir well. Slowly pour in plant-based cream cheese substitute, whisking continuously until fully incorporated and smooth.
Remove tofu from sous-vide bag, slice into thin pieces, and add to the saucepan with the onions and garlic. Cook for another 5 minutes until heated through.
Add lemon juice and vegetable broth to the pan. Stir well and let it simmer for an additional minute to create a creamy sauce.
Serve hot as a side dish or on top of steamed rice or vegetables.
